codeInput.title: Join Class
codeInput.enterCode: Enter the code from your teacher
codeInput.codeHint: 4 digits = class code · 6 digits = your personal code

studentLogin.title: AI Creative Class
studentLogin.haveStudentCode: Have a student code? Log in
studentLogin.codeFromEnrollment: You received this code when you enrolled

error.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.

session.endedBanner: Class ended. You can still play, but progress won't be saved.

returning.foundGame: We found your game from earlier. Is this you?

design.enterHint: Press Enter to use "{placeholder}", or type your own idea

rules.title: Game Rules
rules.description: Set the rules for your maze

prompt.copyThen: Copy it, then paste into Claude AI

upgrade.title: Level Up Your Game
upgrade.easyDesc: Quick changes - pick one and copy
upgrade.mediumDesc: Bigger changes - read the hint, then copy
upgrade.hardDesc: Designer challenges - YOU write the prompt
upgrade.writeYourIdea: What do you want to add?
upgrade.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want in detail...
upgrade.basedOnConversation: Based on your conversation - feel free to edit

debug.title: Debug Your Game
debug.noChats: No debug chats yet. Click "New Chat" to start!
debug.promptFixInstructions: Add this to your prompt, then regenerate:
debug.codeFixInstructions: Send this to Claude to fix the code:
debug.resetInstructions: Use this new prompt to regenerate:
debug.imageTooLarge: Image too large. Maximum size is 2MB.
debug.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
debug.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Did the fix work? Is your game working now?
debug.welcomeBackReset: Welcome back! Is your new game running?
debug.goToClaude: Great! Go to Claude and generate your game. Come back and tell me if it worked!
debug.fallbackGreeting: Hi! What's going wrong with your game?
debug.iterationQuestion: Nice work fixing it! 🎉 Now that it works — if you could make this feature even better or more interesting, what would you change?
debug.iterationResponse: That's a great idea! Try telling Claude: "{idea}"
debug.recoveryResponse: That's a valuable lesson! Remember this next time you build something. 🌟

agent.title: Let's design this upgrade!
agent.verifyUpgrade: Let's check if the upgrade appeared in your game

share.title: Share Your Game!
share.subtitle: Copy the link from Claude and paste it here. Your teacher will send it to your parents!
share.teacherWillSend: Your teacher will send the link to your parents.
share.inlineSubtitle: Copy the link from Claude and paste it here.
share.inlineSharedSubtitle: Your teacher will send it to your parents.

reflection.prompt: Today you used language to control AI and create a real game. What's the most important thing you discovered?
reflection.willShare: Your teacher will share this with your parents. 💌

prediction.title: Before you send to Claude...
prediction.subtitle: What do you think will appear in your game?
prediction.placeholder: I think the game will show... / I predict that...

validation.title: Did your prediction come true?
validation.whyMatched: Great prediction! Why do you think it matched?
validation.whatDifferent: What was different from what you expected?
